parent.policy_statement: Adopt and implement the City of Waterloo Corporate Climate Change Adaptation Plan (CCCAP), outlining 37 actions to adapt City assets, operations, and services to climate change impacts.
parent.verbatim_text:
This document constitutes a Corporate Climate Change Adaptation Plan (CCCAP) for the City of Waterloo. It outlines how the municipality as a corporation will adapt its assets, operations, and services to the impacts of climate change.

The CCCAP includes 37 actions that the City will undertake to adapt to climate change.
parent.extraction_rationale: Named plan with a defined scope and a quantified set of actions ('37 actions') that the City will undertake; serves as the umbrella parent for the listed action items.

section_header: city of waterloo's commitment to climate change

individual.policy_statement: Update the City's green building policy to require that all new or renovated City facilities of a certain size must be LEED silver certified.
individual.verbatim_text:
Other City-specific mitigation activities include:

- Updating the green building policy, which states that all new or renovated City facilities of a certain size must be LEED silver certified.
individual.section_header: City of Waterloo's Commitment to Climate Change
individual.extraction_rationale: Clear policy requirement with a defined standard (LEED Silver) for City facilities; not part of the CCCAP action list structure.

section_header: city of waterloo's commitment to climate change

individual.policy_statement: Commit (through ClimateActionWR) to an 80% greenhouse gas reduction target by 2050 for Waterloo Region partners.
individual.verbatim_text: It is through ClimateActionWR that the City, along with the Region and the Cities of Kitchener and Cambridge, committed to an 80% greenhouse gas reduction target by 2050 viii .
individual.section_header: City of Waterloo's Commitment to Climate Change
individual.extraction_rationale: Quantified mitigation target with a deadline (80% by 2050) explicitly stated as a commitment involving the City.
